title: Maniacs on Wheels
writer: Montagu Slater, William Rose, Jack Lee
actors: Dirk Bogarde, Bonar Colleano, Bill Owen
plot: Factory worker Bill Fox (Sir Dirk Bogarde) is fired from a reliable job and becomes a successful motorbike racer, until his wife threatens to leave him unless he comes to his senses.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
